title: Freshly Grilled Saudi Arabian Lamb Kebabs
description: A herbal and crisp Saudi Arabian dish featuring lamb kebabs grilled to perfection on a salt block, served with a side of mascarpone sauce, this flexitarian friendly meal is perfect for a cozy dinner, the score fat from the lamb adds a rich flavor to the dish.
instructions: Preheat the salt block to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on the preheated salt block and grill for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
While the lamb is grilling, mix the mascarpone cheese with chopped parsley and mint.
Serve the grilled lamb kebabs with a side of the mascarpone sauce.
Garnish with additional parsley and mint if desired.
